The radar chart in the upper right shows "Avg Flight Distance" by day of week with these values:
- Mon: 451
- Tue: 508
- Wed: 415
- Thu: 285
- Fri: 385
- Sat/Sun: 268

Tuesday has the highest value at 508, with the largest sector in the radar chart, indicating the highest flying distance reach. Tuesday
</answer>
